title: Senior Financial Analyst - PwC India - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - PwC India - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
PwC India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Senior Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Meerut. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About PwC India:
PwC India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in SAP FICO

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PwC India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
